channel.title: SpotPulse Trending
channel.description: Live web pulse — India & Global intelligence dashboard.

item.title: April home sales disappoint as higher mortgage rates weigh on buyers
item.description: Home sales barely moved in April, as mortgage rates shot higher the month before and uncertainty over the war with Iran weighed on consumers.

item.title: Driving Ukraine’s Favorite Armored Vehicle
item.description: The CV90 armored vehicle suggests Europe may be improving defense coordination, but rapid changes in warfare raise bigger questions, explains Bloomberg Opinion columnist Marc Champion. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: The Startup Helping OpenAI Optimize Its AI For Cerebras Chips
item.description: As access to Nvidia AI chips become more elusive , major developers such OpenAI and Meta Platforms are diversifying their sources of computing power, including by striking deals to use a variety of AI server chips. But making that approach work is not a cinch. The AI labs need to tailor the code that trains and runs their models to each type of chip they use. It turns out there are startups that do such grunt work. O

item.title: The Startup Helping OpenAI Optimize Its AI For Cerebras Chips - The Information
item.description: The Startup Helping OpenAI Optimize Its AI For Cerebras Chips The Information

item.title: Churning in the AIADMK becomes evident in Tamil Nadu Assembly
item.description: In the morning, a letter, purportedly signed by a group of AIADMK legislators stating that Mr. Palaniswami had been elected the Leader of the Legislature Party, was submitted to the Pro-tem Speaker M.V. Karuppaiah. In the evening, Mr. Shanmugam presented a letter claiming support for the leadership of Mr. Velumani.

item.title: Oil prices jump after Trump dismisses Iran proposal to end war
item.description: The Strait of Hormuz waterway remains effectively shut, severely disrupting global energy shipments.

item.title: Telangana BJP distances itself from POCSO case against Bandi Sanjay’s son, calls it legal issue
item.description: Telangana BJP president dismisses allegations of discrepancies in SIR conducted during the recent Assembly elections

item.title: Cyber Crime Wing notice for blocking social media posts draws criticism
item.description: Incidentally, most of the flagged URLs/posts allegedly contained content critical of Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam and Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay

item.title: Six people found dead inside train car at rail yard near Texas-Mexico border
item.description: Discovery was made by Union Pacific employee inspecting stopped train at the yard in Laredo before it continued its journey north Sign up for the Breaking News US newsletter email Rail workers in Texas found six people dead inside a boxcar at a yard close to the Mexican border on Sunday afternoon, officials said. The discovery was made by a Union Pacific employee inspecting the stopped train at the yard in Laredo bef

item.title: Warning that increase in shipping around South Africa to avoid Middle East could harm whales
item.description: Ships have rerouted around the Cape of Good Hope since 2023 to avoid conflicts in the Middle East.

item.title: India’s booming Dubai gold trade may be built on someone else’s mines
item.description: Policymakers in India are increasingly worried about the surge in gold imports, especially following the beneficial India-UAE trade deal that has intensified gold inflows. In light of this, Prime Minister Modi is calling on citizens to limit their non-essential gold buying habits. This strategic push aims to shield the country from potential economic vulnerabilities during challenging global conditions.

item.title: Suspected explosives on PM Modi’s Bengaluru visit route: NIA joins probe
item.description: Investigators are examining whether the explosive materials were intentionally placed to target the Prime Minister’s convoy route or whether there is a larger conspiracy behind the incident.

item.title: Cole Allen pleads not guilty to trying to assassinate Trump
item.description: Allen is accused of trying to kill Trump, transporting firearms interstate, discharging a firearm during an act of violence and assaulting law enforcement.

item.title: What Oil Shock Means For Your EMI, Grocery Bill, And Salary: A Personal Finance Guide
item.description: India, the world’s third-largest crude importer, depends on imports for nearly 85-90% of its oil requirements.

item.title: Iran War, Oil Sanction, Energy: What Trump And Xi May Focus On During Talks - NDTV
item.description: Iran War, Oil Sanction, Energy: What Trump And Xi May Focus On During Talks NDTV

item.title: US Citizens From Hantavirus Ship Isolated in Nebraska
item.description: US citizens who were on the Hondius cruise ship hit by a hantavirus outbreak are now being isolated in Nebraska. One person is in a specialized biocontainment unit after testing positive for the rare respiratory disease. Shares of Moderna are rising after the company said it’s working on a vaccine. Sam Fazeli of Bloomberg Intelligence has more.

item.title: IRM Energy Q4FY26 PAT Surges 190% YoY; Earnings Call Audio Now Available - India IPO
item.description: IRM Energy Q4FY26 PAT Surges 190% YoY; Earnings Call Audio Now Available India IPO

item.title: Build Application Firewalls Aim to Stop the Next Supply Chain Attack
item.description: Rather than scanning code alone, Build Application Firewalls inspect runtime behavior inside the software build pipeline. The post Build Application Firewalls Aim to Stop the Next Supply Chain Attack appeared first on SecurityWeek .

item.title: Google Says Hackers Used AI to Find Critical Security Flaw
item.description: Google recently observed hackers using AI models to find a previously undiscovered security flaw, the company said on Monday. The hacker planned to use the flaw for a “mass exploitation event,” but Google security researchers believe they successfully warded off the attack after noticing the ...

item.title: Dozens of Nigerian fishermen feared dead after Chad air strikes on Boko Haram
item.description: A fishermen's leader tells the BBC that 40 people are feared dead - either in the strikes or drowning as they tried to flee.

item.title: Indian Hotels Q4 Results: Net profit rises 15% YoY to ₹600 crore; announces dividend of ₹3.25 per share
item.description: Indian Hotels Company reported a Q4FY26 net profit of ₹600 crore, a 15% YoY increase. Revenue rose 14% to ₹2,845 crore, driven by strong hotel segment performance. The company anticipates opening 60 new hotels in FY27, with optimistic demand forecasts.

item.title: “Time expired”: Hackers leak Vodafone source code after company refuses to pay - Cybernews
item.description: “Time expired”: Hackers leak Vodafone source code after company refuses to pay Cybernews

item.title: CashKaro registers 72% rise in revenues for FY26, EBITDA losses down 40%
item.description: CashKaro reported a revenue of Rs 600 crore and lower EBITDA losses has set the company on path to profitability.

item.title: Wall Street upside? HSBC sees S&P 500 at 8,000, raises 2026 target as AI boom and tech earnings fuel optimism
item.description: HSBC raised its 2026 S&P 500 target to 7,650, citing strong corporate earnings and resilient technology stocks. The brokerage said improving AI adoption, broader market participation and easing macro conditions could potentially push the index beyond the 8,000 mark despite lingering inflation and oil price risks.

item.title: Jio revamps mega IPO; DailyObjects lines up fresh capital
item.description: Reliance Industries is revamping Jio Platforms’ IPO plans amid investor disagreements over valuation. This and more in today's ETtech Top 5.

item.title: Why Changing Passwords Doesn’t End an Active Directory Breach
item.description: Resetting a password doesn't always remove attackers from Active Directory. Specops Software explains how cached credentials and Kerberos tickets can keep attackers authenticated after a reset. [...]

item.title: Fertilizer Maker Mosaic Loses Out as Iran Conflict Roils Inputs
item.description: The war in Iran has sent fertilizer prices soaring, but that’s not creating a windfall for producer Mosaic Co.

item.title: China’s Malacca Dilemma, After Hormuz
item.description: Western-dominated insurance premiums can choke off Beijing’s oil supplies more effectively than warships can.

item.title: Aramco Sees 100 Million-Barrel Oil Loss Each Week Hormuz Is Shut
item.description: Global oil markets are losing 100 million barrels every week the Strait of Hormuz is shut, compounding a supply shortage that has already made the Middle East war the most significant supply disruption ever, according to the head of Saudi Arabia’s state oil producer.

item.title: Supreme Court Refuses To Act On Voter Deletion Claims Affecting West Bengal Election Results - LawBeat
item.description: Supreme Court Refuses To Act On Voter Deletion Claims Affecting West Bengal Election Results LawBeat

item.title: Govt mulls new programme to bolster rural industrial landscape
item.description: A new government program, Rural Prosperity and Rural Resilience, will connect industries directly with rural producers. This initiative aims to boost value chains, skills, and market access. It will foster distributed manufacturing and corporate presence in rural areas. The program seeks to transform local economies by integrating livelihoods, enterprise, and digital systems.

item.title: How Your 10% Effort Can Help India Save Billions In Foreign Exchange Every Year
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi's call for conserving resources is aimed at reducing demand for oil products, which will reduce the country's import bill.

item.title: Micron shares are rising again despite weak overall market. Why memory chip rally seems unstoppable
item.description: Micron is among the "most hyped stocks on social media" as retail enthusiasm simmers

item.title: Google-backed Adda247 cuts 20% workforce amid slowing revenue
item.description: Edtech platform Adda247 has reduced its workforce by 20%. This move comes as the company experiences slowing revenue growth. Adda247 is preparing for a planned initial public offering. The company aims to cut costs and streamline operations. Employees in product and content verticals were affected. Adda247 said it is committed to supporting impacted staff.

item.title: BSE launches F&O trading on IT index; debut day turnover at Rs 148 crore
item.description: BSE launched India’s first futures and options contracts linked to the Focused IT Index, offering investors new hedging and trading opportunities in the technology sector. The launch attracted strong participation, reflecting growing interest in sector-specific derivatives amid evolving market dynamics and global technology trends.

item.title: Hantavirus cases spark surge in pharma and biotech stocks — here’s why
item.description: The outbreak of Hantavirus on a cruise ship has led to biotech and pharmaceutical stocks surging on reports of firms developing vaccines.

item.title: India has 60 days of crude oil, natural gas, says govt as Rajnath Singh chairs IGoM meeting to review energy supply
item.description: India has 60 days of crude oil and natural gas supply, as confirmed by the government. Defence Minister Rajnath Singh urged citizens to ‘remain calm’ and assured that measures are being taken to prevent shortages amid global disruptions.

item.title: US stocks today: US stocks slip at open as US-Iran impasse lifts oil price
item.description: Wall ​Street's ​main indexes opened lower ​on Monday, after last week's record-setting ‌rally, ⁠as renewed ⁠worries over ​stalled U.S.-Iran talks lifted ​oil prices and tempered risk appetite.

item.title: UK PM Starmer battles for political survival amid leadership challenge as gilt yields rise
item.description: Starmer said that key issues of growth, defense, the U.K.'s relationship with Europe and energy must be urgently addressed.

item.title: 'Bending, not breaking': Goldman Sachs explains why the war in Iran hasn't derailed the global economy - Yahoo Finance
item.description: 'Bending, not breaking': Goldman Sachs explains why the war in Iran hasn't derailed the global economy Yahoo Finance
